sources.citation_en: Lydia H. Liu, Rebecca E. Karl, and Dorothy Ko, eds., The Birth of Chinese Feminism, Columbia University Press, 2013, publisher summary and table of translated He-Yin Zhen essays.

sources.title: Chinese Philosophy: Overview of Topics — Zhang Dongsun
sources.citation_zh: 《互联网哲学百科全书》“中国哲学：主题概览”之“张东荪：多元文化认识论”节。
sources.citation_en: Internet Encyclopedia of Philosophy, Chinese Philosophy: Overview of Topics, section Zhang Dongsun: Pluralistic Cultural Epistemology.

sources.title: Zhang Junmai (Carsun Chang)
sources.citation_zh: 《互联网哲学百科全书》“张君劢（Carsun Chang）”，第2节“1923年论战与道德形上学”。
sources.citation_en: Internet Encyclopedia of Philosophy, Zhang Junmai (Carsun Chang), sec. 2, The Debate of 1923 and Zhang's Moral Metaphysics.

sources.title: Elements of Sociology: Epistemology and Logic
sources.citation_zh: Nick Knight，《李达与中国马克思主义哲学》之“《社会学大纲》：认识论与逻辑”章，Taylor & Francis电子版。
sources.citation_en: Nick Knight, Elements of Sociology: Epistemology and Logic, in Li Da and Marxist Philosophy in China, Taylor & Francis.

sources.title: Jin Yuelin's Theory of Dao
sources.citation_zh: 胡军《金岳霖的道论》，载成中英、Nicholas Bunnin编《当代中国哲学》，Wiley，2002年。
sources.citation_en: Jun Hu, Jin Yuelin's Theory of Dao, in Contemporary Chinese Philosophy, ed. Chung-Ying Cheng and Nicholas Bunnin, Wiley, 2002.

sources.title: Political Institutions and Responsibilities: Qian Mu and the Study of Chinese Political History
sources.citation_zh: 《政治制度与责任：钱穆与中国政治史研究》，台湾大学学术典藏，论文摘要。
sources.citation_en: Political Institutions and Responsibilities: Qian Mu and the Study of Chinese Political History, National Taiwan University Scholars repository, abstract.

claims.text_zh: 制度、形势、惯例与风气都会随历史改变；改革能否发生，取决于是否有人依据见闻形成是非判断并将其公开表达或付诸实行。
claims.text_en: Institutions, circumstances, precedents, and public habits all change historically; reform depends on people who form judgments from evidence and either voice or implement them.
claims.explanation_zh: 《上大学士书》以制度必变为前提，进而强调人才的见闻、判断与行动，而不是把任何旧例视作不可改变。
claims.explanation_en: The letter begins from the historical mutability of institutions and then stresses informed judgment and action by capable persons rather than treating precedent as immutable.
claims.locator: 《龚自珍集》卷五《上大学士书》开篇
claims.excerpt_text: 自古及今，法无不改，势无不积，事例无不变迁，风气无不移易。
claims.attribution_note: 龚自珍本人奏议式书信的直接论述；命题把紧接其后的“人才—见闻—是非—行动”论证合并概括，没有把后人评价写成原话。

claims.text_zh: 面对外来强权，应系统了解海外形势并学习其优势技术，把知识转化为交涉、防御与制衡能力。
claims.text_en: In confronting foreign powers, one should systematically understand overseas conditions and learn their superior techniques, converting knowledge into capacities for negotiation, defense, and restraint.
claims.explanation_zh: “师夷长技以制夷”在原叙中与“以夷攻夷”“以夷款夷”并列，所指是以调查和学习恢复战略主动，而非无条件模仿。
claims.explanation_en: In the preface, learning foreign strengths stands beside using foreign powers against one another and negotiating with them; the aim is strategic agency through inquiry, not unconditional imitation.
claims.locator: 《海国图志·原叙》首段，说明著书三旨处
claims.excerpt_text: 为师夷长技以制夷而作。
claims.attribution_note: 魏源为本人所编《海国图志》撰写的原叙；“长技”在全书语境中主要涉及军事、航海等可学习能力，命题未扩大为对全部西方制度的接受。

claims.text_zh: 国家求强必须同时发展民众的体力与行动能力、开启其知识判断，并更新公共德性；三者不可只取其一。
claims.text_en: National strength requires developing the people's physical and practical capacity, opening their intelligence and judgment, and renewing public virtue together rather than pursuing only one.
claims.explanation_zh: 《原强》把强国要政归结为“鼓民力、开民智、新民德”三端，显示严复并不把富强简化为器物技术或单纯知识输入。
claims.explanation_en: On Strength reduces the principal tasks of national strengthening to invigorating popular capacity, opening intelligence, and renewing virtue, resisting a reduction of reform to technology or information alone.
claims.locator: 《原强》末段，“今日要政，统于三端”处
claims.excerpt_text: 一曰鼓民力，二曰开民智，三曰新民德。
claims.attribution_note: 这是严复自著《原强》的直接命题，不是《天演论》中赫胥黎原文、严复译文或按语；因此不存在把译入思想误记为严复原创的问题。

claims.text_zh: 大同秩序应超越彼此排他的国家边界，因为国家区隔持续制造私心、竞争与战争；世界公政府取代列国后，天下才可能趋于公。
claims.text_en: The Great Unity should transcend mutually exclusive national boundaries because division into states perpetuates partiality, rivalry, and war; a common world government makes public-minded order possible.
claims.explanation_zh: 《大同书》乙部把“去国界”列为进入大同的制度步骤，并从邦国结构而非个别君主品德解释战争的持续。
claims.explanation_en: Part B of the Book of Great Unity makes removal of national boundaries an institutional step toward Great Unity and explains recurring war through the state system rather than individual rulers' character.
claims.locator: 《大同书·乙部》“去国界合大地”条，第四项
claims.excerpt_text: 至于公政府之时，天下统一，天下为公。
claims.attribution_note: 康有为本人《大同书》的制度设想；命题限定在该书的理想阶段论中，不把它等同于康有为所有时期的即时政治主张。

claims.text_zh: 民众尚未普遍理解公理、旧俗尚存，并不是推迟革命的理由；政治竞争本身能够开启民智、彰明公理并清除妨碍共和的旧俗。
claims.text_en: Incomplete public understanding and persistent old customs are not reasons to postpone revolution; political struggle can itself awaken intelligence, clarify public principles, and remove customs obstructing republican change.
claims.explanation_zh: 章太炎反驳“民智未开故只能立宪”的论证，把革命理解为生成政治能力的过程，而非等待社会先被教育成熟后的结果。
claims.explanation_en: Zhang rejects the argument that an unenlightened populace permits only constitutional monarchy, treating revolution as a process that generates political capacity rather than an outcome that must await prior education.
claims.locator: 《驳康有为论革命书》中段，回应“公理未明、旧俗俱在”论证
claims.excerpt_text: 公理之未明，即以革命明之；旧俗之俱在，即以革命去之。
claims.attribution_note: 章太炎1903年论战文本中的直接主张；命题保留其针对康有为立宪论的语境，没有把论战判断泛化为一切革命必然进步。

claims.text_zh: 六艺不是彼此孤立的知识门类，而是内在互释的义理整体；其分类、会通与解释共同构成理解经典和组织学术的循环。
claims.text_en: The Six Arts are not isolated disciplines but an internally interpreting whole of meaning; their classification, integration, and mutual explanation organize both classical understanding and learning.
claims.explanation_zh: 该命题依据《哲学研究》论文对马一浮六艺论的学术概括，突出其整体性与互释结构，不把论文作者措辞当作马一浮原句。
claims.explanation_en: This claim follows a Philosophical Research article's scholarly reconstruction of Ma's Six Arts theory, emphasizing holism and mutual interpretation without presenting the scholar's wording as Ma's own quotation.
claims.locator: 论文摘要，第3—4句，论“道—道术”层次与诠释学循环
claims.excerpt_text: 把六经理解为一个内在相互关联的义理系统和意义整体。
claims.work_title: 马一浮“六艺论”的诠释学意蕴
claims.attribution_note: 二手同行评审研究的概括；证据明确说明这是研究者对马一浮六艺论的重构，而非马一浮逐字引文。

claims.text_zh: 妇女受压迫不能仅归因于旧礼教，也必须与父权、资本主义劳动关系和帝国主义权力一并分析；因此解放不能缩减为少数女性获得职业或政治资格。
claims.text_en: Women's subjugation cannot be attributed only to old customs but must be analyzed with patriarchy, capitalist labor relations, and imperial power; liberation exceeds elite access to careers or political rights.
claims.explanation_zh: 哥伦比亚大学出版社对何殷震六篇论文的整理指出，她把性别压迫置于跨国的资本、劳动与权力关系中，这也是其无政府女性主义区别于同时代民族主义女权论的关键。
claims.explanation_en: Columbia University Press's edition of six essays shows He-Yin placing gender oppression within transnational relations of capital, labor, and power, distinguishing her anarchist feminism from nationalist feminist programs.
claims.locator: 出版社内容提要，第1—3段；目录所列何殷震六篇论文
claims.excerpt_text: the relationship among patriarchy, imperialism, capitalism, and gender subjugation as global historical problems
claims.attribution_note: 二手大学出版社概括，并非何震英文原句。作者在论文中常署“何震”，现代研究依其父姓殷与夫姓何称“He-Yin Zhen／何殷震”；本项目person_id he-zhen与该作者为同一人。该书将六篇文章明确归于她，避免沿用早期把其文字误归刘师培的做法。

claims.text_zh: 证据的标准、可知对象、感觉材料的选择与解释都受文化结构影响，而知识又必须借特定语言表达；认识因此始终经过文化与语言中介。
claims.text_en: Standards of evidence, objects of inquiry, selection and interpretation of perception are culturally structured, while knowledge is expressed in particular languages; knowing is therefore always culturally mediated.
claims.explanation_zh: IEP把这一立场概括为“多元文化认识论”：差异不只发生在信念内容，也进入何以算作证据和充分理由的认识活动本身。
claims.explanation_en: The IEP calls this pluralistic cultural epistemology: cultural difference affects not only belief content but the epistemic operations by which something counts as evidence or sufficient reason.
claims.excerpt_text: epistemological positions that are inevitably culturally defined and structured
claims.attribution_note: IEP作者对张东荪认识论的二手概括，不是张东荪英文原句；命题严格限定为该节明确讨论的证据、感觉解释、充分理由与语言中介。

claims.text_zh: 科学擅长以客观、分析和因果方法处理规律性对象，却不能由此决定人的人生观；自由意志、价值判断与自我选择需要不同于自然科学的哲学说明。
claims.text_en: Science handles regular objects through objective, analytic, and causal methods, but it cannot thereby determine an outlook on life; free will, value, and self-choice require philosophical treatment beyond natural science.
claims.explanation_zh: 张君劢并非否定科学，而是否定把自然科学方法扩张为唯一世界观；IEP将其1923年立场重构为科学对象与自由精神领域的区分。
claims.explanation_en: Zhang does not reject science; he rejects extending natural-scientific method into the sole worldview. The IEP reconstructs his 1923 position as a distinction between scientific objects and free spiritual life.
claims.locator: 第2节“The Debate of 1923 and Zhang's Moral Metaphysics”，第2—5段
claims.excerpt_text: science cannot predict the future of humanity
claims.attribution_note: IEP对张君劢1923年演讲及后续哲学的二手概括；引文是百科条目作者的英文总结，不冒充张君劢原话。

claims.text_zh: 唯物辩证法的辩证法、逻辑与认识论不是三套彼此分离的学科，而是同一哲学的相互贯通面向；认识过程必须在这种统一中说明。
claims.text_en: Dialectics, logic, and epistemology within dialectical materialism are not three independent disciplines but interconnected aspects of one philosophy through which cognition must be explained.
claims.explanation_zh: Nick Knight对《社会学大纲》认识论章的分析以这一统一命题为开端；这里收录李达的体系结构判断，而不是泛泛贴上“马克思主义”标签。
claims.explanation_en: Nick Knight begins his analysis of the epistemological portion of Elements of Sociology with this unity thesis; the claim records Li's systematic architecture rather than merely labeling him Marxist.
claims.excerpt_text: dialectics, logic and the epistemology of dialectical materialism constitute a unified philosophy
claims.work_title: Elements of Sociology: Epistemology and Logic
claims.attribution_note: 学术专著作者Nick Knight对李达《社会学大纲》的二手释义，不是李达英文原句；命题只采用该章明确归于李达的统一论。

claims.text_zh: 道由“式”与“能”不可分离的结合构成：只有式而无能便是空架，只有能而无式便不可成为现实；现实是能进入可能形式的历程。
claims.text_en: Dao consists in the inseparable conjunction of Form and Stuff: Form without Stuff is empty, while Stuff without Form cannot become actual; reality is Stuff entering possibilities.
claims.explanation_zh: 胡军的学术章节以“物质与形式、可能、现实与过程”等环节重构《论道》，显示金岳霖以逻辑分析建立过程形上学。
claims.explanation_en: Jun Hu reconstructs On Dao through matter and form, possibility, and reality and process, showing how Jin builds a process metaphysics through logical analysis.
claims.locator: 章内“Form and Stuff”及“Reality and Process”两节
claims.excerpt_text: dao can be analyzed into elements, namely, matter (or stuff) and form
claims.attribution_note: 胡军对金岳霖《论道》的二手学术重构；英文术语Form、Stuff对应金岳霖的“式”“能”，证据不是金岳霖英文原句。

claims.text_zh: 研究中国政治史应尊重中国文化的主体性，并从政府与被治理者双方考察制度责任；这不排斥现代或西方方法，所反对的是以外来理论取代对中国史实的准确理解。
claims.text_en: Chinese political history should respect cultural subjectivity and examine institutions from both rulers' and ruled perspectives; modern or Western methods remain usable when they do not displace historical accuracy.
claims.explanation_zh: 该论文摘要特别区分钱穆的文化主体性与拒绝西方方法：他的警告针对“奴隶式依赖”理论框架，而非比较或现代研究方法本身。
claims.explanation_en: The article explicitly distinguishes Qian's cultural subjectivity from rejection of Western methods: his warning targets slavish theoretical dependence, not comparison or modern research techniques themselves.
claims.excerpt_text: he never opposed the use of either modern or western approaches
claims.work_title: Political Institutions and Responsibilities: Qian Mu and the Study of Chinese Political History
claims.attribution_note: 同行评审论文摘要对钱穆史学方法的二手概括，不是钱穆英文原句；命题保留作者所强调的“文化主体性不等于排外方法论”。
